CVE-2020-11810.title: An issue was discovered in OpenVPN 2.4.x before 2.4.9. An attacke ...
CVE-2020-11810.summary: An issue was discovered in OpenVPN 2.4.x before 2.4.9. An attacker can inject a data channel v2 (P_DATA_V2) packet using a victim's peer-id. Normally such packets are dropped, but if this packet arrives before the data channel crypto parameters have been initialized, the victim's connection will be dropped. This requires careful timing due to the small time window (usually within a few seconds) between the victim client connection starting and the server PUSH_REPLY response back to the client. This attack will only work if Negotiable Cipher Parameters (NCP) is in use.

CVE-2020-15078.title: OpenVPN 2.5.1 and earlier versions allows a remote attackers to b ...
CVE-2020-15078.summary: OpenVPN 2.5.1 and earlier versions allows a remote attackers to bypass authentication and access control channel data on servers configured with deferred authentication, which can be used to potentially trigger further information leaks.

CVE-2020-20813.title: Control Channel in OpenVPN 2.4.7 and earlier allows remote attack ...
CVE-2020-20813.summary: Control Channel in OpenVPN 2.4.7 and earlier allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service via crafted reset packet.

CVE-2022-0547.title: OpenVPN 2.1 until v2.4.12 and v2.5.6 may enable authentication by ...
CVE-2022-0547.summary: OpenVPN 2.1 until v2.4.12 and v2.5.6 may enable authentication bypass in external authentication plug-ins when more than one of them makes use of deferred authentication replies, which allows an external user to be granted access with only partially correct credentials.

CVE-2024-3661.title: DHCP can add routes to a client’s routing table via the classless ...
CVE-2024-3661.summary: DHCP can add routes to a client’s routing table via the classless static route option (121). VPN-based security solutions that rely on routes to redirect traffic can be forced to leak traffic over the physical interface. An attacker on the same local network can read, disrupt, or possibly modify network traffic that was expected to be protected by the VPN.

CVE-2024-5594.title: OpenVPN before 2.6.11 does not santize PUSH_REPLY messages proper ...
CVE-2024-5594.summary: OpenVPN before 2.6.11 does not santize PUSH_REPLY messages properly which an attacker controlling the server can use to inject unexpected arbitrary data ending up in client logs.

CVE-2023-46849.title: Using the --fragment option in certain configuration setups OpenV ...
CVE-2023-46849.summary: Using the --fragment option in certain configuration setups OpenVPN version 2.6.0 to 2.6.6 allows an attacker to trigger a divide by zero behaviour which could cause an application crash, leading to a denial of service.

CVE-2023-46850.title: Use after free in OpenVPN version 2.6.0 to 2.6.6 may lead to unde ...
CVE-2023-46850.summary: Use after free in OpenVPN version 2.6.0 to 2.6.6 may lead to undefined behavoir, leaking memory buffers or remote execution when sending network buffers to a remote peer.

CVE-2025-2704.title: OpenVPN version 2.6.1 through 2.6.13 in server mode using TLS-cry ...
